title: erigeron oaxacanus
intro: Erigeron oaxacanus, also known as Mexican daisy or fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Erigeron oaxacanus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
